allow: PowerShell($g = Get-Command gh -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($g\) { "gh: " + $g.Source } else { "gh: NOT FOUND" }; $git = Get-Command git -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($git\) { "git: " + $git.Source } else { "git: NOT FOUND" })
Bash(git -c user.name="arca11" -c user.email="arca11@briarbear.ai" commit -q -m "Initial commit: MRB Virtual Support landing page")

PowerShell($prefix = npm prefix -g; "npm global prefix: $prefix"; $vercelCmd = Join-Path $prefix "vercel.cmd"; "exists: " + \(Test-Path $vercelCmd\); if \(Test-Path $vercelCmd\) { & $vercelCmd --version })
